FX.title: Countdown to 152.50? AI Analytics Identifies Target for USD/JPY Breakout
tldr_points: BOJ's stagflation dilemma caps policy tightening, supporting JPY weakness
Technical setup shows bullish momentum above MA20 with RSI at 61
FX.excerpt: BOJ policy constraints and technical momentum drive USD/JPY higher. Key resistance at 152.50.
FX.comment: Bullish momentum above MA20 with BOJ policy constraints supporting JPY weakness.
